Container.Name: signoz-aio
Container.Overview:
SigNoz is a self-hosted observability platform for traces, metrics, and logs. [center][b][color=#ff8c00]JSONbored Verified AIO Template[/color][/b][/center]
This Unraid AIO template packages the official SigNoz Docker stack into a single container with sensible defaults for a first deployment. It internally manages SigNoz, the SigNoz OTEL collector, ClickHouse, and ZooKeeper, so you do not need to translate the upstream multi-container compose stack yourself. Advanced users can also override the metadata database and ClickHouse endpoints with supported upstream-backed settings.
[b]All-In-One (AIO) Edition[/b] Install it, keep the defaults, and point your OpenTelemetry senders at the published OTLP ports. Advanced settings are available for power users, but they are intentionally limited to real upstream-backed options instead of speculative extras.
[b]Initial Setup:[/b] 1. Click Apply. 2. Wait for first startup to complete. This image boots multiple internal services, so the first run is heavier than a typical single-service container. 3. Open the WebUI on port 8080. 4. Send telemetry to OTLP gRPC on 4317 or OTLP HTTP on 4318. 5. Optional: enable the built-in local host agent if you want this same Unraid machine to forward host metrics, Docker metrics, and Docker logs into SigNoz automatically.
[b]Resource Note:[/b] ClickHouse makes SigNoz powerful, but also heavier on RAM, disk, and startup time than lighter AIO apps.
Container.Changes: ### 2026-04-27 - Generated from CHANGELOG.md during release preparation. Do not edit manually. - Rebased the SigNoz AIO template on the current fleet baseline. - Updated bundled SigNoz, collector, ClickHouse, and ZooKeeper pins. - Added advanced runtime options for external databases, SMTP, host telemetry, and SigNoz tuning. - Added Docker-backed validation for default, restart, external service, host-agent, SMTP, and ingestion paths.

Config.Name: SigNoz UI Port
Config.Description: Main SigNoz UI and API port.

Config.Name: OTLP gRPC Port
Config.Description: OTLP gRPC ingest port for agents, SDKs, and collectors sending telemetry into SigNoz.

Config.Name: OTLP HTTP Port
Config.Description: OTLP HTTP ingest port for telemetry senders that use HTTP instead of gRPC.

Config.Name: AppData - SigNoz Root
Config.Description: Single persistent root that stores ClickHouse data, ZooKeeper state, generated config, and SigNoz SQLite metadata by default.

Config.Name: [Host Agent] Enable Local Host Agent
Config.Description: Advanced. Set to true to let this same container also collect local host metrics, Docker metrics, and Docker logs from this Unraid machine when the default host mounts are present.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone.

Config.Name: [AIO] Startup Wait Timeout Seconds
Config.Description: Advanced. Maximum seconds the wrapper waits for SigNoz or ClickHouse readiness before failing with a clear startup error.

Config.Name: [Access] External URL
Config.Description: Advanced. Public SigNoz URL used in generated links when serving through a reverse proxy.

Config.Name: [Access] Ingestion URL
Config.Description: Advanced. Public ingestion endpoint URL if agents should advertise a different OTLP endpoint than the UI URL.

Config.Name: [Metadata DB] Provider
Config.Description: Advanced. Metadata database backend for organizations, users, dashboards, and settings. Leave at sqlite for the built-in self-contained install, or set to postgres to use an external PostgreSQL database.

Config.Name: [Metadata DB] SQLite Path
Config.Description: Advanced. SQLite file path for SigNoz metadata when the metadata DB provider is set to sqlite.

Config.Name: [Metadata DB] SQLite Journal Mode
Config.Description: Advanced. SQLite journal mode for the default metadata database.

Config.Name: [Metadata DB] SQLite Busy Timeout
Config.Description: Advanced. How long SQLite waits for metadata database locks before failing.

Config.Name: [Metadata DB] SQLite Transaction Mode
Config.Description: Advanced. SQLite transaction locking mode.

Config.Name: [Metadata DB] Max Open Connections
Config.Description: Advanced. Maximum open SQL metadata-store connections.

Config.Name: [Metadata DB] Max Connection Lifetime
Config.Description: Advanced. Maximum SQL metadata connection lifetime. Use 0s for no lifetime limit.

Config.Name: [Metadata DB] PostgreSQL DSN
Config.Description: Advanced. PostgreSQL connection string used when SIGNOZ_SQLSTORE_PROVIDER=postgres. Example: postgres://signoz:your_password@postgres:5432/signoz?sslmode=disable

Config.Name: [Auth] Provision Root User
Config.Description: Advanced. Set to true to provision a SigNoz root admin user on startup. This works with either SQLite or PostgreSQL metadata storage.

Config.Name: [Auth] Root User Email
Config.Description: Advanced. Root user email address used when root user provisioning is enabled.

Config.Name: [Auth] Root User Password
Config.Description: Advanced. Root user password used when root user provisioning is enabled.

Config.Name: [Auth] Root User Org Name
Config.Description: Advanced. Organization name for the provisioned root user.

Config.Name: [Auth] Root User Org ID
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional predetermined UUIDv7 for the root user's organization.

Config.Name: [Auth] Invite Max Token Lifetime
Config.Description: Advanced. Maximum lifetime for invitation tokens.

Config.Name: [Auth] Allow Self Password Reset
Config.Description: Advanced. Allows users to request their own password reset flow.

Config.Name: [Auth] Reset Max Token Lifetime
Config.Description: Advanced. Maximum lifetime for password reset tokens.

Config.Name: [Host Agent] Host Root Path
Config.Description: Advanced. Host root mount used by the optional local host agent for host metrics collection. Leave at the default when enabling the local host agent on Unraid.

Config.Name: [Host Agent] Docker Socket
Config.Description: Advanced. Docker socket mount used by the optional local host agent for Docker metrics collection. This has security implications because it exposes Docker control access to the container.

Config.Name: [Host Agent] Docker Container Logs Path
Config.Description: Advanced. Docker containers log directory used by the optional local host agent for container log collection.

Config.Name: Tokenizer JWT Secret
Config.Description: Optional. Leave blank to auto-generate a persistent secret on first boot and save it under /appdata/config/generated.env.

Config.Name: [Tokenizer] Rotation Interval
Config.Description: Advanced. Interval for SigNoz token rotation.

Config.Name: [Tokenizer] Rotation Grace Duration
Config.Description: Advanced. Grace duration for previous token pairs after rotation.

Config.Name: [Tokenizer] Idle Lifetime
Config.Description: Advanced. Idle session lifetime before reauthentication.

Config.Name: [Tokenizer] Max Lifetime
Config.Description: Advanced. Maximum session lifetime before reauthentication.

Config.Name: [Tokenizer] Max Tokens Per User
Config.Description: Advanced. Maximum opaque tokens tracked per user when using opaque token internals.

Config.Name: [ClickHouse] Use External ClickHouse
Config.Description: Advanced. Set to true to disable the bundled ClickHouse and ZooKeeper services and use external ClickHouse endpoints instead. When enabled, configure the ClickHouse DSN and healthcheck URL options below.

Config.Name: [ClickHouse] Base DSN
Config.Description: Advanced. Base ClickHouse DSN used by SigNoz. Leave at the default for the bundled database, or point it at your external ClickHouse endpoint.

Config.Name: [ClickHouse] Healthcheck URL
Config.Description: Advanced. HTTP healthcheck URL used before SigNoz and the collector start. Change this when using external ClickHouse.

Config.Name: [ClickHouse] Max Open Connections
Config.Description: Advanced. Maximum open ClickHouse connections used by SigNoz.

Config.Name: [ClickHouse] Max Idle Connections
Config.Description: Advanced. Maximum idle ClickHouse connections used by SigNoz.

Config.Name: [ClickHouse] Dial Timeout
Config.Description: Advanced. ClickHouse connection dial timeout.

Config.Name: [ClickHouse] Query Max Execution Time
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional ClickHouse max_execution_time query setting.

Config.Name: [ClickHouse] Query Max Execution Time Leaf
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional ClickHouse max_execution_time_leaf query setting.

Config.Name: [ClickHouse] Query Speed Check Delay
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional ClickHouse timeout_before_checking_execution_speed query setting.

Config.Name: [ClickHouse] Query Max Result Rows
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional ClickHouse max_result_rows query setting.

Config.Name: [ClickHouse] Query Max Bytes To Read
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional ClickHouse max_bytes_to_read query setting.

Config.Name: [ClickHouse] Ignored Data-Skipping Indices
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional comma-separated ClickHouse data-skipping indices to ignore for SigNoz queries. Leave blank for the upstream default.

Config.Name: [ClickHouse] Secondary Index Bulk Filtering
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional ClickHouse secondary index bulk filtering setting. Leave blank for the upstream default.

Config.Name: [Host Agent] Prometheus Targets
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional comma-separated Prometheus scrape targets for the built-in local host agent, for example: node-exporter:9100,cadvisor:8080.

Config.Name: [Host Agent] Prometheus Metrics Path
Config.Description: Advanced. Metrics path used for the built-in host agent's Prometheus scrape targets.

Config.Name: [Host Agent] Prometheus Scrape Interval
Config.Description: Advanced. Scrape interval used for Prometheus targets defined for the built-in host agent.

Config.Name: [Collector] OTEL Resource Attributes
Config.Description: Advanced OpenTelemetry resource attributes injected into the internal collector. Useful if you want a clearer default host or environment label.

Config.Name: [Collector] Low Cardinal Exception Grouping
Config.Description: Advanced upstream collector option for ClickHouse trace exception grouping. Leave at false unless you intentionally want the alternate grouping behavior.

Config.Name: [Collector] ClickHouse Base DSN Override
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional collector-specific ClickHouse base DSN override. Leave blank to inherit the main ClickHouse base DSN.

Config.Name: [Collector] ClickHouse Timeout
Config.Description: Advanced timeout used by the internal SigNoz collector for ClickHouse operations and migrations.

Config.Name: [Collector] ClickHouse Cluster Name
Config.Description: Advanced cluster name used by the SigNoz collector migrations. The official external ClickHouse setup requires the cluster name to remain cluster unless you know exactly what you are changing.

Config.Name: [Collector] ClickHouse Replication Mode
Config.Description: Advanced replication setting used by the SigNoz collector migrations.

Config.Name: [Collector] Traces DSN
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional collector DSN for traces database. Leave blank to derive from the base ClickHouse DSN.

Config.Name: [Collector] Metrics DSN
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional collector DSN for metrics database. Leave blank to derive from the base ClickHouse DSN.

Config.Name: [Collector] Logs DSN
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional collector DSN for logs database. Leave blank to derive from the base ClickHouse DSN.

Config.Name: [Collector] Meter DSN
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional collector DSN for SigNoz meter database. Leave blank to derive from the base ClickHouse DSN.

Config.Name: [Collector] Metadata DSN
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional collector DSN for telemetry metadata database. Leave blank to derive from the base ClickHouse DSN.

Config.Name: [Collector] Batch Send Size
Config.Description: Advanced. OTel collector batch send size for regular telemetry pipelines.

Config.Name: [Collector] Batch Max Size
Config.Description: Advanced. OTel collector maximum batch size for regular telemetry pipelines.

Config.Name: [Collector] Batch Timeout
Config.Description: Advanced. OTel collector batch timeout for regular telemetry pipelines.

Config.Name: [Collector] Meter Batch Send Size
Config.Description: Advanced. OTel collector batch send size for SigNoz meter telemetry.

Config.Name: [Collector] Meter Batch Max Size
Config.Description: Advanced. OTel collector maximum batch size for SigNoz meter telemetry.

Config.Name: [Collector] Meter Batch Timeout
Config.Description: Advanced. OTel collector batch timeout for SigNoz meter telemetry.

Config.Name: [Collector] Self Metrics Scrape Interval
Config.Description: Advanced. Scrape interval for the collector's own Prometheus metrics.

Config.Name: [Collector] pprof Endpoint
Config.Description: Advanced. Internal collector pprof endpoint. This port is not published by the Unraid template.

Config.Name: [SigNoz] Analytics Enabled
Config.Description: Advanced. Enables upstream Segment analytics if a Segment key is configured. Leave false for homelab deployments.

Config.Name: [SigNoz] Stats Reporter Enabled
Config.Description: Advanced. Enables upstream anonymous stats reporting internals. Set false if you want to disable it.

Config.Name: [SigNoz] API Timeout Default
Config.Description: Advanced. Default API request timeout.

Config.Name: [SigNoz] API Timeout Max
Config.Description: Advanced. Maximum API request timeout.

Config.Name: [SigNoz] API Timeout Excluded Routes
Config.Description: Advanced. Comma-separated API routes excluded from request timeout handling.

Config.Name: [SigNoz] API Logging Excluded Routes
Config.Description: Advanced. Comma-separated API routes excluded from request logging.

Config.Name: [SigNoz] pprof Enabled
Config.Description: Advanced. Enables SigNoz internal pprof endpoint inside the container. The port is not published by default.

Config.Name: [SigNoz] pprof Address
Config.Description: Advanced. Internal SigNoz pprof bind address. Do not publish this unless you understand the exposure risk.

Config.Name: [SigNoz] Ruler Eval Delay
Config.Description: Advanced. Delay applied when evaluating alerting rules.

Config.Name: [SigNoz] Alert Repeat Interval
Config.Description: Advanced. Default repeat interval for the built-in SigNoz Alertmanager route.

Config.Name: [SigNoz] Alert Resolve Timeout
Config.Description: Advanced. Default global resolve timeout for the built-in SigNoz Alertmanager.

Config.Name: [SigNoz] Alert External URL
Config.Description: Advanced. External URL used by alert notifications when SigNoz is behind a reverse proxy.

Config.Name: [SigNoz] Metrics Explorer Threads
Config.Description: Advanced. ClickHouse query threads used by Metrics Explorer.

Config.Name: [Email] Enabled
Config.Description: Advanced. Enables SigNoz email delivery through SMTP. When true, set a valid SMTP from address.

Config.Name: [Email] SMTP Address
Config.Description: Advanced. SMTP server host:port for SigNoz emails.

Config.Name: [Email] From Address
Config.Description: Advanced. From address for SigNoz emails.

Config.Name: [Email] SMTP Username
Config.Description: Advanced. SMTP username.

Config.Name: [Email] SMTP Password
Config.Description: Advanced. SMTP password.

Config.Name: [Email] SMTP TLS Enabled
Config.Description: Advanced. Enables TLS for SMTP.

Config.Name: [Cache] Provider
Config.Description: Advanced. SigNoz cache provider. Leave memory for the self-contained default; set redis only when using an external Redis cache.

Config.Name: [Cache] Memory Max Cost
Config.Description: Advanced. Ristretto in-memory cache max cost in bytes.

Config.Name: [Cache] Redis Host
Config.Description: Advanced. External Redis host when SIGNOZ_CACHE_PROVIDER=redis.

Config.Name: [Cache] Redis Port
Config.Description: Advanced. External Redis port.

Config.Name: [Cache] Redis Password
Config.Description: Advanced. External Redis password.

Config.Name: [Feature] Use Span Metrics
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional upstream feature flag override for span metrics.

Config.Name: [Feature] Kafka Span Eval
Config.Description: Advanced. Optional upstream feature flag override for Kafka span evaluation.

Config.Name: [ZooKeeper] Auto-Purge Interval
Config.Description: Advanced internal housekeeping interval in hours for ZooKeeper snapshot and log cleanup. The default matches the official SigNoz Docker deployment.

Config.Name: [ZooKeeper] Prometheus Metrics Enabled
Config.Description: Advanced. Enables ZooKeeper Prometheus metrics inside the container.

Config.Name: [ZooKeeper] Prometheus Metrics Port
Config.Description: Advanced. Internal ZooKeeper Prometheus metrics port. This port is not published by the Unraid template.
